title: Eco-Friendly City Plan
scenario: Design an eco-friendly city plan for a sustainable future. The plan should include at least 5 unique green technologies, with a clear description of how they will be implemented. The output should be in the format of a city plan document, with multiple sections and subsections.
constraints: Must include at least 2 green transportation systems
Must describe at least 1 unique green building material

evaluationCriteria.description: How accurately and creatively are the green technologies described?
How feasible and practical is the plan for implementation?
How significant and impactful is the plan for improving the environment?
